description_long: This object is a portable handheld gaming console styled in a brown color scheme, reminiscent of classic Nintendo devices. The main unit features a clamshell design with a top screen displaying a Super Mario Bros. game scene and a lower half with a D-pad, four colored action buttons, and a start/select bar, all set in a retro layout. Surrounding the console are several game cartridges, each with distinct labels and gold connector pins, suggesting the device supports interchangeable games. The back of the console is smooth with visible branding and a cartridge slot, while the sides show hinge mechanisms and possible audio jacks. The materials appear to be primarily plastic with some metallic and electronic components inside. The overall design is compact, lightweight, and clearly intended for portable entertainment.
description: A brown, clamshell-style handheld gaming console with a Super Mario Bros. screen and several game cartridges. Features classic controls and retro design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open console with screen, D-pad, colored buttons, and visible game cartridges.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the console, hinge, and scattered cartridges.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back of the console, branding, and cartridge slot.
description_view_3: Side-rear view showing the hinge, audio jacks, and arrangement of cartridges around the console.
